## 🏨 Best Budget-Friendly Hotel: **Montmartre Suites**
| Hotel | Rating | Price Range (per night) |
|---|---|---|
| Le Marais Boutique | 4.2 ⭐ | $120 – $180 |
| **Montmartre Suites** | **4.7 ⭐** | **$110 – $200** |
| Good Night | 5.0 ⭐ | $240 – $400 |
| Luxury Palace | 5.0 ⭐ | $500 – $1,000 |

✅ **Montmartre Suites** offers the best balance of high rating (4.7⭐) and affordability, starting at just **$110/night**.

---

## 🚗 Best Budget-Friendly Car Rental: **Paris Rent-a-Car**
| Company | Rating | Price Per Day |
|---|---|---|
| **Paris Rent-a-Car** | **4.5 ⭐** | **$45/day** |
| Eiffel Tower Car Rental | 5.0 ⭐ | $60/day |

✅ **Paris Rent-a-Car** is the more affordable option at **$45/day** with a solid 4.5⭐ rating.

---

## 🍽️ Best Budget-Friendly Restaurant: **Miznon**
| Restaurant | Rating | Price Per Person |
|---|---|---|
| **Miznon** | **4.3 ⭐** | **$15** |
| New Israeli Restaurant | 4.5 ⭐ | $20 |
| Chez L'Ami Jean | 4.4 ⭐ | $24 |
| Royal Panda | 4.2 ⭐ | $25 |
| Le Baratin | 4.8 ⭐ | $30 |
| ... | ... | ... |

✅ **Miznon** offers the lowest price per person at just **$15**, with a great 4.3⭐ rating and vibrant atmosphere.

---

## 💰 Minimum Cost for a 3-Day Trip

| Item | Calculation | Minimum Cost |
|---|---|---|
| 🏨 Montmartre Suites (3 nights) | $110 × 3 | **$330** |
| 🚗 Paris Rent-a-Car (3 days) | $45 × 3 | **$135** |
| 🍽️ Miznon (2 meals/day × 3 days) | $15 × 6 | **$90** |
| **Total** | | **$555** |
